title: 5 Best Anime of Winter 2026, Ranked By Their Finale
content: The Winter 2026 season is almost at an end, meaning that most of the anime that began airing this season have now concluded, including the five best of the season. This season felt truly different, featuring the return of many great anime while also debuting a few new ones.
author: ComicBook

title: Jujutsu Kaisen Finally Confirms Yuta’s Power (& It’s Why He’s Stronger Than Gojo)
content: Jujutsu Kaisen has brought Season 3 of the anime to an end with an explosive finale , and with it has finally confirmed Yuta Okkotsu’s very powerful Cursed Technique. Jujutsu Kaisen 0 first introduced Yuta to the series as a Special Grade sorcerer thanks to the amount of Cursed Energy in his body thanks to his bond…
author: ComicBook

title: One of the Best Isekai Anime Confirms 2027 Movie Return With New Trailer
content: One of the best Isekai anime franchises ever is coming back with a new movie next year, and fans have gotten the first look at what to expect from the franchise’s return with a new trailer showing it off.
author: ComicBook

title: All 10 Episodes of Frieren: Beyond Journey’s End Season 2, Ranked
content: Frieren: Beyond Journey’s End Season 2 has come to an end as Winter 2026 closes, wrapping up the small narratives the series has portrayed throughout this season. This season was truly different, and frankly, there is no single concrete factor to judge its episodes.
author: ComicBook

title: After 15 Years, Cancelled Shonen Jump Revival Anime Confirms Fall 2026 Release With New Look
content: 15 years after the series was unceremoniously cancelled within the pages of Shueisha’s Weekly Shonen Jump magazine, one hidden gem of a series is coming back with a new revival anime later this Fall.
author: ComicBook

title: New One Piece Preview Shares First Look at Elbaph Arc Premiere
content: One Piece is set to enter an entirely new era of the anime later this week, and a new preview has dropped the first look at the Elbaph Arc’s premiere episode. One Piece is one of the major anime releases fans are going to be keeping an eye out for this April as part of the Spring 2026 anime schedule , but this is an…
author: ComicBook

title: Netflix Hypes Major Shonen Jump Anime’s Return for Season 2 With New Trailer
content: Netflix has a lot of new anime that fans are going to want to keep an eye on for the rest of the year, and they’re getting ready for another major Shonen Jump anime release with a new trailer showing off its second season.
author: ComicBook

title: New Gundam Game Features Epic 5 v 5 Battles (And It Arrives Later This Year)
content: Mobile Suit Gundam has continued to be a powerhouse in the realms of anime and film , and now a brand new addition to the franchise is ready to roll , though this time in the realm of gaming.
author: ComicBook

title: Dragon Ball Super Reveals New Goku and Vegeta Looks Ahead of Anime’s Return
content: Dragon Ball Super is getting ready to bring the anime back to our screens after a very long time, and the franchise has shared a cool new look for Goku and Vegeta ahead of the anime’s comeback.
author: ComicBook

title: Shonen Jump Cancels Major 2026 Series Before It Got to End Its Story
content: Shueisha’s Weekly Shonen Jump magazine has now cancelled its third major series of 2026, but this one didn’t even try to end its story. It’s now the start of a new quarter for Shonen Jump, and that means they are going to get ready to introduce some new serializations in the hopes that they take off with fans.
author: ComicBook
